## Meeting Purpose

[Screening Victor Alagbe for the Managing Editor role.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**AI-Driven Workflows:** Victor uses AI (ClearScope, Claude) for deep research and voice profiling, transforming generic content into unique, high-quality pieces and automating line editing via Grammarly Business.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [**Process-First Leadership:** At CryptoNary, Victor solved team conflict and inconsistent quality by implementing a structured process (checklists, style guides, approval gates) that made editorial feedback objective and actionable.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
  - [**Outcome-Oriented Philosophy:** Prioritizes client business outcomes over simple deliverable completion. This means proactively addressing underperforming content and escalating to personal intervention if a project has high business or relationship risk.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [**Panzer's Success Metric:** Success is measured by client business outcomes (e.g., traffic, conversions), not just on-time delivery. The ME role focuses on strategy and metrics, with an engineering team building tools to automate production.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)

## Topics

### Editorial Philosophy & Quality

  - [**Core Principle:** Editorial quality is defined by clarity and logical flow, not just grammar.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [**"Ladders Up" Framework:** A piece is high-quality if its ideas connect directly back to the client's business goals.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
      - [Piece → Content Team Brief → Audience Need → Business Impact](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1069.0)
  - [**"Good Enough" Rubric:** The decision to ship is based on a risk assessment.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
      - [**High Risk:** A project tied to a client revenue event (e.g., product launch) or a new/at-risk client. These deadlines are non-negotiable, requiring personal intervention to ensure quality and delivery.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1546.0)
      - [**Low Risk:** A project with no immediate business or relationship risk. This allows for more time to refine a draft if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)

### Process Improvement: CryptoNary Case Study

  - [**Problem:** A talented team was dysfunctional due to a lack of process.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
      - [**Symptoms:** Inconsistent workflows, missed deadlines, subjective feedback, and mutual disrespect between analysts and editors.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1145.0)
  - [**Solution:** Victor implemented a structured process to make quality objective and repeatable.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1128.0)
      - [**Culture Shift:** Aligned the team on the shared goal of serving paying customers (£50/mo subscribers).](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
      - [**Process Gates:** Introduced idea approval before drafting to prevent wasted effort.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
      - [**Objective Tools:**](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
          - [**Checklists:** Replaced subjective feedback with clear, measurable criteria.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
          - [**Style Guides:** Defined "good" to remove ambiguity.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
      - [**Phased Drafting:** For new writers, used 30% (outline) and 90% drafts to provide early feedback and prevent rework.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1363.0)
  - [**Result:** The publication became a professional, production-ready operation, leading to Victor's promotion to Head of Content.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1389.0)

### AI-Driven Content Workflows

  - [**Problem:** Repetitive SEO content (e.g., "how to bridge from chain X to chain Y") was generic and ineffective.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [**Solution:** Used AI to create unique, high-quality pieces at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
      - [**ClearScope:** Analyzed SERPs in \~13 minutes per topic to find content gaps, enabling unique outlines for 50+ articles.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=349.0)
      - [**Claude:** Used voice profiles (built from tweets, transcripts) to generate authentic executive thought leadership, reducing review cycles.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=476.0)
      - [**Grammarly Business:** Automated line editing and style guide enforcement, freeing editors to focus on narrative and ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [**"OnBrand" Tool Demo:** A personal Python CLI tool that objectively scores content against a defined brand persona (e.g., casual/formal, playful/serious, technical/non-technical), with platform-specific analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)

### Panzer's Success Metric & Tooling Philosophy

  - [**Primary Metric:** Client business outcomes (e.g., conversions, traffic, SEO visibility). On-time delivery is a baseline, not the goal.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1669.0)
  - [**Proactive Strategy:** MEs must monitor metrics and proactively address underperforming content, proposing new strategies to clients.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=1797.0)
  - [**Tooling Philosophy:** Panzer is tool-agnostic.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=2217.0)
      - [**Internal Eng Team:** Automates repeatable tasks, freeing MEs for strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=2094.0)
      - [**ME Role:** Articulate workflow needs to the eng team. Personal scripts (like "OnBrand") are seen as prototypes for potential integration into the company's pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=2217.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Marilia:** Contact Victor Alagbe with next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/rFtDbKCXuXrV8xcVTpMj_1hzza56yqZ2?tab=summary&timestamp=2359.0)
